items.title: To Expand Reproductive Health Care Access, Cadence OTC Went to the Convenience Store
items.description: Co-founder Samantha Miller has a simple goal: Make Plan B available everywhere condoms are sold.

items.title: Her Fluorescent Crops Give a Voice to Plants—and Power to Farmers
items.description: Shely Aronov’s InnerPlant has raised $53 million and partnered with John Deere to help plants alert farmers to pests and disease.

items.title: Meet Throne Labs, the Company Making Public Bathrooms a Better Place to Go
items.description: After a year of major growth, Jessica Heinzelman’s smart, modular public bathrooms are in 20 cities and counting.
